<?php namespace DeepCopy\TypeFilter\Spl; use DeepCopy\DeepCopy; use DeepCopy\TypeFilter\TypeFilter; /** * In PHP 7.4 the storage of an ArrayObject isn't returned as * ReflectionProperty. So we deep copy its array copy. */ final class ArrayObjectFilter implements TypeFilter { /** * @var DeepCopy */ private $copier; public function __construct(DeepCopy $copier) { $this->copier = $copier; } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function apply($arrayObject) { $clone = clone $arrayObject; foreach ($arrayObject->getArrayCopy() as $k => $v) { $clone->offsetSet($k, $this->copier->copy($v)); } return $clone; } }
